title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, Deno, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich, self-hosted ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama models.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder APIs and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama: chat, generate, pull, and list models with idiomatic Ruby.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps Ollama with prompts history, syntax highlighting, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed models and minimal API examples.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + ChromaDB + Streamlit in 100 lines.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client for Ollama with async/await and native JSON streaming.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir library with GenServer behaviour for resilient Ollama connections.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client generated from OpenAPI spec with comptime JSON parsing.

title: ollama-kt
summary: Multiplatform Kotlin SDK for Ollama targeting JVM, Android, and iOS via Ktor.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart package for Flutter apps to chat with local Ollama models on-device.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with tokio and native TLS, published to crates.io.
